title: DAY 14 — CRM-M12 — CALLBACK & FOLLOW-UP MANAGEMENT (FULL) + CRM-M10 — EMAIL HANDLING / FRESHDESK (DAY 1 OF 2)

questions.question: At what frequency must the Callback Request sheet be checked, and what is the SLA for actioning a callback?

options.text: Once at shift start; callback within 4 hours
At shift start and mid-shift; callback within 2 hours of the request timestamp
Every hour; callback within 1 hour
At shift start only; callback within 2 hours

questions.question: Three callback requests are pending: (1) a customer asking about delivery timeline, (2) a customer reporting a wrong product received, (3) a customer requesting a return. In what order should these be prioritised?

options.text: (1) delivery timeline → (2) wrong product → (3) return request
(3) return request → (2) wrong product → (1) delivery timeline
(2) wrong product → (3) return request → (1) delivery timeline
(2) wrong product → (1) delivery timeline → (3) return request

questions.question: A customer does not answer the callback call. After how many failed attempts is the customer marked as "Unreachable," and what must be updated?

options.text: After 2 attempts; update Comments as "Not Connected" and leave Call Back Done blank
After 3 attempts spaced across the shift; update Comments as "Unreachable — 3 attempts" and set Call Back Done = Yes
After 5 attempts; update Comments as "Unreachable" and escalate to CRM Asst Manager
After 3 attempts; update Comments as "Unreachable" but leave Call Back Done = No until the next shift

questions.question: What is the correct path to access the MyOperator Follow-Up module?

options.text: MyOperator → Dashboard → Follow Up
MyOperator → Call → Follow Up
MyOperator → Tickets → Follow Up
MyOperator → Reports → Follow Up

questions.question: At EOD, two MyOperator Followup tab entries remain open. What must the executive do before logging off?

options.text: Log off and leave them for the next shift — the overnight team will pick them up
Mark both as Closed regardless of resolution status to clear the tab
Add a specific status remark to each entry explaining why it is unresolved, then escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `customer-care` Slack before logging off
Transfer both entries to another executive's queue and log off

questions.question: An executive notices a MyOperator follow-up assigned to the Logistics department in their Follow Up module. What is the correct action?

options.text: Action it immediately — all follow-ups visible in the module should be completed
Do not action it — check only CRM department follow-ups; do not action another department's follow-ups without CRM Asst Manager instruction
Transfer it to the Logistics department queue and mark it as complete
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager to reassign it before taking any action

questions.question: Which Freshdesk dashboard view should the agent start from every day?

options.text: All Tickets
New & My Open Tickets
All Unresolved Tickets
All Undelivered Messages

questions.question: A ticket arrives from someone saying "I'd like to apply for the customer care position — please find my CV attached." What is the correct action?

options.text: Reply with available positions and forward the CV to HR → Close ticket
Tag as Application → No reply needed → Close ticket
Mark as Spam → Click Yes → Ticket auto-removed
Assign to Ishan Sir → Add internal note → Do NOT close

questions.question: A ticket contains a legal notice from a consumer court lawyer regarding a customer complaint. What is the correct handling?

options.text: Reply with the standard complaint resolution template → Close ticket
Mark as Spam since legal matters are handled offline
Assign/tag to Ishan Sir → Add internal note → Do NOT close until further update
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `customer-care` Slack → Close ticket after acknowledgement

questions.question: Before replying to a customer's email about a return request, what must the executive verify first?

options.text: Check the canned response library for a matching template
Confirm the customer's email address is valid
Check in FIMS → OMS → Shopify → Order Search Panel to verify order details, status, and return eligibility (within 10 days of delivery)
Check the Mails sheet to see if this customer has emailed before

questions.question: A customer emails "Where is my order?" without providing an Order ID. What is the correct response approach?

options.text: Search FIMS by the customer's email address and reply with tracking details
Use the canned response unmodified — "ask for Order ID" template
Customise a reply asking for the Order ID and customer name
Mark the ticket as Pending and wait for the customer to provide details

questions.question: When must a canned response ALWAYS be customised before sending?

options.text: Only when the customer's query does not match any available canned response
When the customer's name, Order ID, AWB number, specific date, or any placeholder appears in the canned text and must be filled in
Only when the customer has previously contacted Sylvi about the same issue
Only when the canned response contains more than 3 paragraphs

questions.question: What is the non-negotiable rule about canned response placeholders?

options.text: Placeholders must be highlighted in bold before sending
Never send a reply with unfilled placeholders — if [Order ID] or [Name] is left blank, it is a quality failure
Placeholders should be removed entirely if the information is not available
Placeholders are acceptable for internal notes but not customer replies

questions.question: What are the 7 columns in the Mails tab of Daily Work - CRM-2026, and must spam emails be logged?

options.text: Agent, Date, Order ID, Mail Reason, Comment — 5 columns only; spam is excluded
Agent, Date, Order ID / Mail ID, Mail Reason, Order Status, Comment, Resolution Status — 7 columns; every ticket including spam must be logged
Agent, Date, Ticket ID, Category, Status, Comment, Escalation Level — 7 columns; spam is excluded
Agent, Date, Order ID, Customer Name, Issue Type, Resolution, Follow-Up Date — 7 columns; only customer emails are logged

questions.question: After replying to a customer's email about their order, what mandatory FIMS action must the executive perform?

options.text: Update the order status in FIMS to reflect the email resolution
Add a General Comment on the order in FIMS: "Email ticket #[Ticket ID] — [issue type] — [action taken] — [date]"
Create a new FIMS ticket linked to the Freshdesk ticket ID
No FIMS action is required — the Mails sheet entry is sufficient

questions.question: Which of the following is a valid reason to NOT close a Freshdesk ticket?

options.text: The customer has not replied within 24 hours of the agent's response
The ticket is categorised as a product query with no order attached
A return/replacement/repair request is still being processed
The agent has already logged the ticket in the Mails sheet
